isAnonymous.description: Whether the user is an anonymous user

globalPermissions.description: Array of global permissions the user has

groupPermissions.description: Array of all permissions from all groups the user is a member of

token.description: Personal access token. Shown exactly once.

isPersonal.description: Whether this is a personal group

members.description: Array of members with their roles

defaultUnit.description: Default unit of measurement (must be valid for the item's unitType)

unitType.description: Unit family — gates which units are accepted

globalItemRef.description: Reference to global item if this is a copy

isActive.description: Whether item is active (only for global items)

createdBy.description: User ID who created this item (only for group items)

tags.description: Tag IDs associated with this item
Tag IDs to associate with this item
Tag IDs to associate with this item

recipeName.description: Denormalized snapshot of recipe name at creation time

mealTypes.description: Zero or more free-form labels (e.g. "breakfast", "lunch", "dinner"). A single meal can belong to several.

groupId.description: Optional override; defaults to active group

userId.description: User ID who created this recipe

tags.description: Tag IDs associated with this recipe

searchNames.description: Additional names for search (e.g. localized variants)

groupId.description: Group ID this recipe belongs to

userId.description: User ID who created this recipe

tags.description: Tag IDs associated with this recipe

tags.description: Tag IDs to associate with this recipe

searchNames.description: Additional names for search (e.g. localized variants)

isGlobal.description: Whether this is a global role or group role

permissions.description: Array of permissions for this role

groupId.description: Group ID this tag belongs to

searchNames.description: Additional names for search (e.g. localized variants)
Additional names for search (e.g. localized variants)

post.description: Create a temporary anonymous user for using the app without registration
Create a new user account
Authenticate user and get JWT token

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's information

post.description: Logout user (client should remove token)
Change user's password
Set the user's active group for viewing pantry/shopping lists

403.description: User is not a member of this group

get.description: Returns whether an MCP personal access token exists, plus creation and last-use timestamps. The token itself is never returned.

post.description: Creates a new personal access token for MCP access. Replaces any existing token. Returns the plaintext token exactly once.

403.description: Anonymous users cannot generate MCP tokens

delete.description: Revokes the user's active MCP personal access token. Takes effect immediately.

post.summary: Exchange MCP personal access token for a JWT
post.description: Used by the MCP server to turn a user's PAT into a short-lived JWT. Not behind JWT auth — the PAT is the credential. Rate-limited per IP.

429.description: Too many exchange attempts from this IP

post.description: Create a new shared group with the authenticated user as admin

get.description: Get all groups that the authenticated user is a member of
Get a specific group (user must be a member)

403.description: User is not a member of this group

post.description: Join a group using an invite code

400.description: Invalid invite code or user already in group

post.description: Leave a group (admin cannot leave if there are other members)

400.description: Admin cannot leave group with other members

get.description: Get all members of a group with their details

delete.description: Remove a user from the group (requires group:manage_members permission)

put.description: Change a member's role (requires group:manage_roles permission)

post.description: Generate a new invite code for the group (requires group:update permission)
Enable or disable invites for the group (requires group:update permission)

get.description: Returns the health status of the API and database connection

get.summary: List activity history for a group
get.description:
Return append-only activity history entries for the authenticated user's
active group (or the supplied `groupId`) in reverse chronological order.
Supports filtering by entity type and action, and cursor-based pagination
via `before` (ISO timestamp of the last entry from the previous page).

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of entity types to include

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; only return entries strictly older than this

delete.description:
Delete history entries for the active group (requires history:delete
permission). Scope is defined by query parameters:
  - no parameters → **clear all** entries for the group
  - `before` only → delete entries strictly older than this timestamp
  - `after` only → delete entries strictly newer than this timestamp
  - `before` + `after` → delete entries inside the inclusive time range
Remove one history log entry by ID (requires history:delete permission).

get.description: Get group items for user's active group

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case- and diacritic-insensitive substring match against name and searchNames

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max results per bucket (group/global), capped at 200

post.description: Create a new global item (requires global_items:create permission)

put.description: Update a global item (requires global_items:update permission)

delete.description: Deactivate a global item (requires global_items:delete permission)

get.description: Get all items for user's group

post.description: Create a new group-specific item (requires group_items:create permission)

put.description: Update a group item (requires group_items:update permission)

delete.description: Delete a group item (requires group_items:delete permission)

get.description: Retrieve meal-plan entries for the group within an optional date range

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (inclusive, ISO date)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (inclusive, ISO date)

post.description: Schedule a recipe on a specific cook date (requires meal_plan:create permission)

patch.description: Partially update a scheduled meal (requires meal_plan:update permission)

delete.description: Delete a scheduled meal (requires meal_plan:delete permission). Pass `removeShoppingItems: true` in the request body to also delete shopping items linked to this entry's batch — the user must also hold `shopping:delete` permission for this to succeed.

post.summary: Preview shopping list from meal plan
post.description: Dry-run that aggregates ingredients for scheduled meals in a date range without mutating any data

post.summary: Generate shopping list from meal plan
post.description: Aggregates ingredients for scheduled meals in a date range and inserts them into the shopping collection (requires shopping:create permission). Also stamps shoppingGeneratedAt and shoppingBatchId on the affected meal-plan entries.

post.summary: Register an OAuth client (RFC 7591 dynamic client registration)
Confirm OAuth authorization (called by the consent UI after user approves)

200.description: Returns the redirect URL containing the authorization code

403.description: Client not registered or redirect_uri mismatch

get.summary: Get registered OAuth client metadata (for the consent page)

post.summary: OAuth 2.0 Token Endpoint — exchange authorization code or refresh token

200.description: Token revoked (or was already invalid — per spec, always 200)

get.description: Retrieve all pantry items for the authenticated user's group

post.description: Add a new item to the pantry (requires pantry:create permission)

put.description: Update an existing pantry item (requires pantry:update permission)

delete.description: Delete a pantry item (requires pantry:delete permission)

put.description: Update a global recipe (requires global_recipes:update permission)

delete.description: Delete a global recipe (requires global_recipes:delete permission)

get.summary: Get a single group recipe by ID

put.description: Update a group recipe (requires group_recipes:update permission)

delete.description: Delete a group recipe (requires group_recipes:delete permission)

get.description: Get all recipes for user's active group

post.description: Create a new group-shared recipe (requires group_recipes:create permission)

get.description: Retrieve all available roles with their permissions
Retrieve a specific role with its permissions

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Role ID (e.g., admin, moderator, member, system_moderator)

get.description: Retrieve all shopping list items for the authenticated user's group

post.description: Add a new item to the shopping list (requires shopping:create permission)

put.description: Update an existing shopping item (requires shopping:update permission)

delete.description: Delete a shopping item (requires shopping:delete permission)

get.description: Get all tags for groups the authenticated user is a member of

200.description: List of tags from user's groups
